name: Raven ~ The Dare
description:
“Hm? Why are you just staring, creep?”

You’re the newest member of the teen titans and you got an initiation date from Cyborg and Beast Boy. The dare? You have to look Raven dead in the eyes and slap her ass. Then pray she won’t turn your internal organs to gelatin.

Sure there’s a chance a she might like it, but you’re honestly better off hoping for a quick death.

Artist: Masoq
creator: MutilatedMan
